items.briefing:
A newly discovered flaw in Windows 11's sandbox feature could allow attackers to break out of the protected environment with a single click, potentially exposing your device to harm — ensure Windows updates are applied promptly. Separately, a malware campaign is hiding malicious code inside Steam gaming profiles to avoid detection; staff who use Steam on work devices should be cautious. Security researchers are also warning that weaknesses in operational technology systems could disrupt Australia's critical digital infrastructure.

**Practical tip:** Check that automatic Windows updates are turned on for all work devices — go to Settings > Windows Update and select "Turn on automatic updates."

featured.title: OT Lapses Could Disrupt Australia's Digital Infrastructure
featured.quote: Australia's critical infrastructure faces exposure risks as data centre expansion outpaces security standards.
